name: Kate's Party Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour once and measure it out.
2. Add baking powder and salt to the flour three times and sift together.
3. Grate lemon rind into butter and cream thoroughly until smooth.
4. Gradually add sugar while continuing to cream.
5. Add flour alternately with milk, a small amount at a time, beating after each addition until smooth.
6. Add vanilla.
7. Fold in egg whites quickly and thoroughly.
8. Fill one greased 10-inch layer pan three-quarters full with the batter.
9. To the remaining batter, add egg yolks and blend well.
10. Turn into two greased 10-inch layer pans.
11. Bake layers in a moderate oven (375 degrees F.) for 25 to 30 minutes.
12. Arrange white layer between yellow layers.
13. Spread Orange Filling (see recipe) between layers and Orange Mist Frosting (see recipe) on top and sides of cake.
14. Sprinkle the top with orange coconut, made by blending 4 ounces shredded coconut and 1 1/2 teaspoons grated orange rind.
